title: Service fails with status=203/EXEC after a package move
description_md:
The `apiserver` service fails immediately on start. `systemctl status` shows `status=203/EXEC`. The binary was relocated by a package update, but its unit file wasn't updated to match. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), correct the unit so it points at the real binary, reload systemd, and get it running.

You're done when `systemctl is-active apiserver` reports `active`.
